title: My Family Lives in Freedom Because of What I Built
subtitle: An energy statement for anchoring the generational freedom vision as a present-tense fact
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 71 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the old belief that lasting family freedom is out of reach; the allow names it as the direct result of what is being built now.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 71 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 71 theme of a 12-week money programme. The Day 71 work centres on picturing generational family freedom as a real and buildable outcome. This statement anchors the link between the work being done now and the freedom it creates for generations ahead.
I am ready to release every belief that lasting family freedom is too big, too slow, or too far away to build. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the truth that my family lives in freedom because of what I am building now. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 71 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
